title: LKM query plan (main-agent authored)
description: Read-only retrieval plan written by the main agent after inspecting current inquiry/BP state. gd lkm-review executes exactly these queries and does not invent its own.

id.description: Unique id within this query plan; used for raw artifact filenames.

target_qid.description: Optional Gaia claim qid this query is meant to inspect.

intent.description: Main-agent retrieval intent, e.g. support_check, conflict_check, frontier. This is not a Gaia action kind.

text.description: Precise LKM search text authored by the main agent.

rationale.description: Why current inquiry/BP state makes this query useful.
